inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Material density varies; standard densities from ASM Handbook.

inputs.label: Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Sheet thickness; typical range 0.1-100 mm per ISO 3574.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Sheet width; standard widths up to 5000 mm.

inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Sheet length; standard lengths up to 12000 mm.

inputs.label: Unit System
inputs.businessContext: Select measurement system; metric (mm, kg) or imperial (in, lb).

rules: if unitSystem == 'imperial' then thickness, width, length must be in inches

thresholds.thickness: if thickness < 0.5 then 'Thin sheet; handle with care'
thresholds.width: if width > 3000 then 'Oversized; special handling required'

formulas.density: case materialType when 'steel' then 7850 when 'aluminum' then 2700 when 'copper' then 8960 when 'stainless_steel' then 8000 when 'brass' then 8500 else 7850 end
formulas.weightPerSheetImperial: if unitSystem == 'imperial' then (thickness * width * length) * 0.2836 else null
formulas.totalWeightImperial: if unitSystem == 'imperial' then weightPerSheetImperial * quantity else null

hiddenLossDrivers: if thickness < 0.5 then 'Thin sheet; handle with care'
if width > 3000 then 'Oversized; special handling required'
